title: Daimlo

{{Quote|You're gonna fry!|"Scorch" Zanales, a Daimlo Podracer pilot, taunting other pilots in Huttese|translated=1|audio=ScorchZanales-Fry.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
The '''Daimlos''' were a [[Sentience|sentient]] [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Daimla]]. They were short, thick, and heavily built, and their large heads were equipped with [[Bone/Legends|skullplates]] and horns. [[Zanales|"Scorch" Zanales]] was a Daimlo who had distinguished [[Gender/Legends|himself]] in the sport of [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biology and appearance==
Daimlos were a powerfully built [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with stout girth and large heads. The heavily plated head of a Daimlo featured two [[Color/Legends|green]]-gray horns, a [[Mouth/Legends|muzzle]] with two rows of [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], and a pair of red [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="SWRR" />

The gray-skinned body of a Daimlo was comparatively short and stocky, with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]] ending in four-fingered hands, and was supported by two reverse-jointed legs ending in four-toed, hoof-like feet. Daimlos also possessed tails.<ref name="SWRR" />

==Society and culture==
{{Quote|'Scorch' Zanales, going to Podrace.|"Scorch" Zanales, speaking in Huttese|translated=1|audio=ScorchZanalesReadyToRace.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
A [[Standard year/Legends|year]]-long Daimlo coming-of-age ritual on Daimla involved using one's [[Bone/Legends|skullplate]]<ref name="SYE" /> and horns<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|367|Zanales, Scorch}}</ref> to knock opponents unconscious.<ref name="SYE" /> While [[Daimli]] was considered the primary [[Language/Legends|language]] of the Daimlos,<ref name="RRSG" /> at least one Daimlo, [[Zanales]], spoke [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]]. [[Gender/Legends|He]] wore [[Clothing/Legends|clothes]] featuring a purple [[Armor/Legends|breastplate]], tan sleeves, and red ankle wraps, as well as long, black fringes around the waist.<ref name="SWRR" />

==History==
{{Quote|Oooh! Don't mess with 'Scorch' Zanales!|Announcer [[Dax Gazaway]], on "Scorch" Zanales' aggressive racing|audio=Dax_Gazaway_Don_t_Mess_With_Scorch.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
[[File:Scorchgamorr.png|thumb|right|180px|"Scorch" Zanales pilots his Banshee-11 Podracer.]]
Daimlos originated from the [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Daimla]],<ref name="RRSG" /> in the [[Kallea sector/Legends|Kallea sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC Daimla">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Daimla system/Legends|Daimla system]]</ref> Zanales, also known as "Scorch," was a Daimlo male who came to be regarded as a hero on his [[Homeworld/Legends|native]]<ref name="SYE" /> Daimla<ref name="RRSG" /> after he successfully defeated his peers in his species' coming-of-age ritual. The reputation that Zanales gained from this feat carried over into his professional [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracing]] career<ref name="SYE" /> in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="EP1note">''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'', which includes the appearances of [[Banshee-11]] and the [[Hutt Championships]], takes place eight [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Therefore, the events of ''Star Wars: Racer Revenge'' must take place in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]], which predates the [[Declaration of a New Order|fall]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by five years, according to ''The New Essential Chronology''.</ref>

==Daimlos in the galaxy==
{{Quote|Moving up the field, it's 'Scorch' Zanales!|Announcer Dax Gazaway|audio=DaxGazawayDontMessWithScorch.flac|<ref name="SWRR" />}}
The Daimlo Zanales competed in the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] Podracing competition on the<ref name="TDG">''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''</ref> [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Euceron system/Legends|Euceron system]]</ref> world of [[Euceron]]<ref name="TDG" /> in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'', which includes the appearance of [[Zanales]], to [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].</ref> and in the Outer Rim Territories–wide [[Hutt Championships]]<ref name="SWRR" /> in [[24 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]].<ref name="EP1note" /> Zanales became a crowd favorite and loved putting on a good show. He was flamboyant, unpredictable, and knew all about beating up opponents, a holdover from coming out on top during the rituals on his homeworld.<ref name="SYE" />

By 24 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="EP1note" /> the company known as [[Daimlo Engineering]] produced the [[Banshee-11]], a model of [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]]. Zanales flew one during the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] Championships.<ref name="RRSG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Daimloconcept.jpg|thumb|right|180px|Concept art for the Daimlo species]]
The Daimlo species first appeared in the [[2002]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''<ref name="SWRR" /> and was named in the [[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|accompanying strategy guide]], written by [[Mario De Govia]] and [[Damien Waples]].<ref name="RRSG" /> Concept art for ''Racer Revenge'' shows the species with brown [[Hair/Legends|fur]], bright-purple eyes, and a slightly different body shape, with longer legs and a less-defined muzzle.<ref name="SWRR" /> The [[2008]] reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' misspells the singular form of the species as "Daimlos."<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]''
*[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games (abridged audiobook)|''Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games'' abridged audiobook]]
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' {{1st}}
